feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Penitent
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 177,066Chapters: 19/21Kudos: 23

Summary: Bruce Wayne has been many things. Heir. Vigilante. Billionaire. The particular kind of broken that wears control like armor. When he contracts with professional Dom Clark Kent through The Agency, he's looking for structure. A container. Something to hold the edges of a life that has been running at catastrophic load for twenty years. What Clark is looking for is more complicated. What Clark finds is more complicated still. Penitent is the story of two men doing difficult work — some of it in session, most of it in the spaces between. It moves non-linearly through Bruce's eleven-month contract, Clark's formation as a Dom and survivor, and the slow, brutal, necessary business of one person learning to return another person's body and mind to themselves. This is not a love story disguised as kink. This is kink as the mechanism by which a love story becomes possible. Read Supplicant first. Not optional.

entry.title: Bring the Bird Home
entry.summary:
Author: dolcesher

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,288Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 59

Summary: There had been one universe they’d visited in which he and Clark were together. Married. But Bruce refused to think about it. Everything was easier that way.Except now stood a child that seemed to be from a universe much like that one, where he and Clark were not just together, but parents.An eleven year old Dick Grayson is mysteriously transported from a parallel universe where he was adopted by Bruce and Clark as a baby. While Bruce takes care of him, he examines his relationship with his sons, and a certain Kryptonian that won't leave him alone.

entry.title: Oh sweet, sweet chestnut jelly
entry.summary:
Author: SolventBoy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,984Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 68

Summary: He’ll be here, Clark thought, forcing his shoulders to relax. He wouldn’t have suggested this place if he didn't want to come. He looked around the room, eyes wide. Desperate to find a distraction—to do anything other than stare at the empty chair in front of him.

entry.title: Game Over
entry.summary:
Author: bad_emissary

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,207Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Kal-El stares at the seats, the round table. Tries to picture his counterpart sitting here, leading. "What did they call this place?"  "The Watchtower." Kelex explains again, hovering at his side. "The orbiting base of Earth's collection of strongest heroes. Termed the Justice League."

entry.title: What You Don't Know
entry.summary:
Author: NoodleDragon324

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,582Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Inspired by the movie In & Out(1997) Smallville, Kansas: a sunny Midwestern town where everyone knows everyone and the wedding of a beloved local high school English teacher, Clark Kent, feels like national news. Clark couldn't be happier here, living with his soon-to-be wife and getting to see his best friend, Bruce, every day at a job that he loves. Nothing else in the world seems to matter when you have it all right here, but it certainly feels like the whole world is watching when Clark's former student gives an interview to hundreds of millions of people telling them that Clark is gay, just three days before his wedding.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: If you want my bones, I shall give them to you
entry.summary:
Author: The_True_Reader

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,911Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 174

Summary: When a twenty-one year old Peter Parker died, he thought he'd at least get to complain to whatever God there was for his sorry life. He didn't expect to wake up in a cold, rainy, and unfamiliar place. He really didn't expect to be kidnapped immediately either. So, an average Tuesday in Peter Parker's life. --- Or, because I suck at summaries: Another typical Peter Parker in Gotham fic, except things aren't as typical as you would expect, and something feels really wrong.

entry.title: Wrong Color
entry.summary:
Author: the99thfanboy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,204Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: Summertime Prompt: Day 5, "Doppelgangers/Evil Twins" Pairing Type: M/M Summary: A peaceful night in Gotham is interrupted by imposters from another Earth. Each is strikingly similar to their Super counterparts, but everything is the wrong color. The Bats are attacked by evil and twisted versions of their partners with no mercy or remorse.

entry.title: Surprise...?
entry.summary:
Author: HorndHooves

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,092Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 48

Summary: "Hey Boostie," Ted exclaimed from where he was grabbing a snack from the cupboards. "Why not just get him a gag gift? He'd probably expect that from you.""Yes!" Michael snapped his fingers. "Yeah! I'll like, get him a glitter bomb or an alien dildo or something."That perked Bruce's ears up, as he turned to face Booster. "A gag gift?"The gold endowed "hero" smiled in a very unheroic way, Bruce could practically hear Ted shiver behind him."Oh. Buddy. Gag gifts are the best! You never got one?""I prefer all my gifts to be thought out and put with care, not something silly that isn't useful or means nothing to me.""But it does mean something! Best friendship!" That last part he said while gripping Batman's shoulder, looking at the wall like there was some fake audience. As if—what like he's in some weird fanfiction or TV show?___Aka, Bruce gets Clark a dog collar as a gag gift for his birthday. Everyone is happy with this. Especially Clark.

entry.title: One second is enough
entry.summary:
Author: Marras_23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,050Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: Death is something that seems far away from us. An event that awaits us patiently at the end of our path, of our life. We live our lives without fearing for the mooment they would end.Until we face death. One second is enough to lose our lives, and a life is sometimes not enough to get over death. How will the strongest man on the planet deal with Bruce Wayne's death?---This is like a third/second part of Robins' Parent Trand and Until Death Do Us Apart, but it can be read independently.

entry.title: The Bat and the Little Bird
entry.summary:
Author: Malve106

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,677Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 17

Summary: Bruce Wayne is completely fed up with the public appearances he's forced to make, but when a clumsy journalist catches his attention, he feels grateful to be there. Prologue: "The full moon beautifully illuminated the sky over Gotham City. On this side of town, one could almost forget, if only for a moment, the problems that had been dragging the vigilante’s city into decay. The annual charity event hosted by the Wayne Foundation had begun a few hours earlier at the residence of the city’s prince."

entry.title: Save a horse (ride a cowboy)
entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,904Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 450

Summary: A small mistake that involved burning down of mayor's family yacht, lands city boy Bruce Wayne in his aunt's small town ranch in Texas where he's disciplined by the dust in his lungs, blisters on his hands and a cowboy, who makes him forget why he ever wanted to leave in the first place.

entry.title: Missing (bat)Man
entry.summary:
Author: LadyRiversoftheNorth

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,737Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 43

Summary: This story is a Superbat story inspired by the manhua Missing Love: The Marrying Man. I treat cannon as my own personal playground so there will be some bending where I want to because I am god here. Unlike my other work, this will not have an update schedule, I apologize. Chapters will come as inspiration does, but I do not foresee it being more than a few weeks between each update. TW: Graphic descriptions of torture, violence, and rape in this fiction, (never between the ML and MC!)   When Bruce/Batman gets in over his head and is kidnapped, Superman must step in for Gotham, and for Bruce's ward/sidekick Dick Grayson. But as Clark Kent he must also track down Bruce Wayne...and he is not the world's greatest detective.

entry.title: corruption begins with the mouth
entry.summary:
Author: mitsukiris

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,271Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 48

Summary: the tongue; the wanting. the first poem in the world is: i want to eat. or: Clark has been inserted in the church for as long as he can remember. Even as a child, as a teen. Praying has always been the one thing he knows. The one thing he is able to do when all else fails. Nothing comes close to the power of God in his eyes, not even his own desires of the flesh. And those, well, he has many. Still, here he is. A seminarian. A candidate. About to be ordained as a transitional deacon. As pure as he can be, in every sense of the word. It’s his last night as simply Clark Kent. Tomorrow changes everything. Bruce has been in love with Clark for as long as he can remember. Even as a child, as a teen. Loving Clark Kent came as natural to him as breathing. From the moment they first met, merely months after he had lost his parents, nothing comes close to Clark Kent in his eyes. Not even the people he has been with were enough to forget. And those people, well, were many. Now, here he is. After years of watching Clark give himself to church, Bruce feels like he is about to lose his chance for good if he doesn’t act on it. He has to. Tonight changes everything.
